description: {"description": "Leaf exhibits irregular margins with evidence of chlorosis and necrosis. Leaf texture appears slightly thickened and potentially leathery. Overall leaf shape is somewhat distorted."} {"description": "Multiple, small, dark brown to black necrotic spots are present. Lesions are generally circular to irregular in shape, with some exhibiting a slightly raised or scabrous texture. Some lesions appear coalescing."} Lesions are distributed across the leaf surface, with a higher concentration towards the margins and older leaf tissue. Distribution appears somewhat random, but with a tendency to cluster.
